channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chemical Tanker crew are sought for immediate joining. This role offers a rejoining bonus for officers, pension funds, health insurance, onboard internet, and gym equipment. Michelin Star Chef support is also provided. Apply online or via email to join the fleet.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chemical Tanker Crew Openings at Elburg Shipmanagement Philippines Inc.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer is required for a 27,000 GRT chemical/oil tanker. A White CoC is mandatory for this position. The salary offered is USD 6,000–6,500. Further details regarding joining date and contract duration are available upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Vacancy on Chemical/Oil Tanker at IRPSL Holder

item.description:
Location: Great Yarmouth / River Humber
Description:

A Master (200gt minimum, CTV/Windfarm experience) is needed for night shifts supporting an SOV near Great Yarmouth, starting August 4th for 3 weeks. A Chief Mate with tanker endorsement and bunker experience is required for the River Humber, starting August 28th for 2 weeks training followed by a 4 weeks on/off rotation. Travel is paid for the Chief Mate position. Relevant certificates must be revalidated.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Chief Mate Jobs - CTV/Tanker Vessels at Rix Shipping

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Marine Superintendent position is available for Chemical Tankers. Candidates with relevant experience are encouraged to apply. This role offers an opportunity for career advancement within the maritime industry. Further details and application instructions can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Superintendent Job on Chemical Tanker at Direct Search Global

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Qualified and experienced Indonesian seafarers are sought for multiple positions on a Tanker Vessel (GT > 10,000). Open roles include Master, Chief Officer, Second Officer, Bosun, Pumpman, Cook, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, ETO/Electrician, Fitter, Able Seaman, and Oiler. Candidates require valid STCW 2010 certificates with at least 12 months validity. Prior experience on similar vessels and with centrifugal cargo pumps is advantageous. Immediate joining is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Vacancies on Tanker Vessel (GT > 10,000) at PT. Waruna Nusa Sentana

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Hiring is underway for multiple positions on a tanker operating under a Saudi Aramco project. Seeking experienced Chief Engineers with at least 2 years of experience and a CE Unlimited COC. Also recruiting Second Officers with a minimum of 1 year WKO experience, Crane Operators with 1 year rank experience, Able Seafarers (AB) with 2 years of experience, and Oilers with 2 years of experience. Contract durations vary, with unpaid rotations of 3 months on/off or 180 days on/off. Joining is upon provisional approval and visa issuance. All certificates must be valid for at least 12 months, and passports for a minimum of 1 year.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Roles on Tanker - Saudi Aramco Project at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Hiring is underway for multiple maritime roles aboard a tanker vessel operating on a Saudi Aramco project. Seeking experienced Chief Engineers, Second Officers, Crane Operators, Able Seamen (AB), and Oilers. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, with specific COC and certificate validity needed. Contract durations are 3 months on/off unpaid or 180 days on/off unpaid. Salary is to be discussed. Joining is upon provisional approval and visa issuance, or as soon as possible.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Positions on Tanker Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

A Second Officer position is available on a worldwide trading Crude Oil Tanker. The contract duration is 4 months, with joining expected in approximately 2 months. The offered salary ranges from 5,000 to 5,500 USD per month.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Officer Job - Crude Oil Tanker at BalticCareer

item.description:
Location: Oman
Description:

Seafarers are sought for an Oil Tanker (24,700 GRT) with immediate joining available in Oman. Open positions include AB (USD 1200-1500), ETO (USD 6500), and Chief Officer (USD 5,500). Similar vessel experience is required, and White Coc/Indian Cop certificates are accepted. Promotional candidates are also considered. The joining process is online.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB, ETO, Chief Officer Jobs on Oil Tanker at BlackHarbor Maritime Services Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Technical Director position is available on an oil tanker. Candidates with relevant experience are encouraged to apply. Further details regarding the role and application process can be found via the provided link. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals seeking career advancement in the maritime industry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Technical Director Job on Oil Tanker at Direct Search Global
